caption: The video features a man performing in front of an audience, likely in a small indoor venue with wooden blinds covering the windows behind him. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery. The man is holding a guitar and singing into a microphone, suggesting he is either playing music or giving a speech. The audience, visible in the foreground, appears to be attentively listening. The setting has a warm and intimate atmosphere, enhanced by the natural light filtering through the blinds. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization.
